results.changes: Replaced verbose 434-line SKILL.md with concise 60-line version. Added explicit directory-to-extension mapping table and shell commands using glob patterns (mv *.pdf etc).
results.issues: zsh fails on glob patterns like *.tar when no matching files exist, causing most files to end up in other/ instead of correct categories.

results.changes: Replaced shell glob patterns with find -exec mv approach to avoid zsh no-match errors. Added explicit warning not to use glob patterns. Verified with confirmation run (also 100/100).

keyOptimizations: Reduced SKILL.md from 434 lines to ~65 lines for qwen3-30b context efficiency
Replaced generic examples/tips with exact directory names and extension mappings
Used find -exec instead of shell globs to avoid zsh no-match errors
Provided concrete md5sum-based duplicate detection command
Added explicit report format for duplicate groups
